title: 🚀 The Update Hub is Here!
message: We've completely revamped how you discover new features and updates.
points: 🔔 Smart Alerts: Get notified about new versions directly inside the app.
📖 Interactive Changelog: See exactly what's new the moment you update.
🤫 Mute Option: Not ready to update? Mute alerts until the next release.
⚡ Smooth UI: Added a beautiful blur backdrop and sleek animations.
